nasb.text: Amaziah the son of Joash king of Judah lived fifteen years after the death of Jehoash son of Jehoahaz king of Israel.

esv.text: Amaziah the son of Joash, king of Judah, lived fifteen years after the death of Jehoash son of Jehoahaz, king of Israel.

cnv.text: 以色列王約哈斯的兒子約阿施死後，猶大王約阿施的兒子亞瑪謝仍活了十五年。

ccb.text: 以色列王约哈斯的儿子约阿施死后，犹大王约阿施的儿子亚玛谢又活了十五年。
